title: Unit 5 – Practice Pool 3: Linking Words – Tony and his Phone
description: Verbinde je zwei Sätze mit dem richtigen Bindewort: after, before, as soon as, whenever, because, when

items.question: Welches Bindewort passt? (weil/da)
Welches Bindewort passt? (bevor)
Welches Bindewort passt? (nachdem)
Welches Bindewort passt? (sobald)
Welches Bindewort passt? (wenn/als)
Welches Bindewort passt? (jedes Mal wenn)
We often saw each other ___ he got his new smartphone. (bevor)
Tony can't leave his phone alone ___ he's really into texting.
___ I asked him to go to the cinema, he said yes. (als)
He said yes ___ I asked him. (sobald)
You must switch off your phone ___ the film starts. (bevor)
___ Tony heard that, he was shocked. (als)
___ a phone rings at the cinema, it makes people angry. (jedes Mal wenn)
___ Tony plays video games, he doesn't call me. (jedes Mal wenn - Beispiel)
He got a new smartphone for his birthday. We often saw each other ___. → Bindewort am Satzanfang
The film is starting. You must switch off your phone ___. → Bindewort
Tony can't leave his phone alone. He's really into texting. → Bindewort
Sometimes a phone rings at the cinema. It makes people angry. → Bindewort
Tony heard that. He was shocked. → Bindewort
Kausalsatz mit 'weil' → Bindewort
